name: Bael
appearance_en: Appears as a cat, a toad, a man, or all three at once
appearance_zh: 以貓、蟾蜍、人形，或三者同時顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Bael, aligned with invisibility and cunning.
invocation_en: I call upon BAEL, noble King of the East, commander of 66 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in invisibility, cunning, and learning.
invocation_zh: 我召喚巴耶爾，東方尊貴的王，統領66個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予隱形、機智、學識之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Agares
appearance_en: Appears as an old nobleman riding a crocodile and bearing a hawk
appearance_zh: 現為騎著鱷魚、手持鷹隼的年老貴族
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Agares, aligned with languages and travel.
invocation_en: I call upon AGARES, noble Duke of the East, commander of 31 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in languages, travel, and earthquakes.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿加雷斯，東方尊貴的公爵，統領31個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予語言、旅行、地震之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Vassago
powers_en: Speaks of what is to come
appearance_en: Appears as a courteous prince in gentle human form
appearance_zh: 以溫和有禮的人形王子顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Vassago, aligned with divination and secrets.
invocation_en: I call upon VASSAGO, noble Prince of the West, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, secrets, and prophecy.
invocation_zh: 我召喚瓦薩戈，西方尊貴的王子，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、秘密、預言之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Gamigin
appearance_en: Appears as a small horse or ass and speaks with a hoarse voice
appearance_zh: 形如小馬或驢子，並以沙啞聲音說話
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Gamigin, aligned with necromancy and learning.
invocation_en: I call upon GAMIGIN, noble Marquis of the North, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in necromancy, learning, and ghosts.
invocation_zh: 我召喚加米金，北方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予死靈術、學識、幽靈之助。
safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.
safety_note_zh: 請加強靈性防護、保持供品潔淨，並正式完成閉儀。不要讓任何通往幽界的通道無人看守。

name: Marbas
appearance_en: Appears first as a great lion and later as a man
appearance_zh: 先以巨獅之形出現，之後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Marbas, aligned with healing and secrets.
invocation_en: I call upon MARBAS, noble President of the West, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in healing, secrets, and mechanics.
invocation_zh: 我召喚馬巴斯，西方尊貴的總裁，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予療癒、秘密、機械之助。
safety_note_en: Use clean ritual conditions and pair all spiritual work with practical care. Never substitute invocation for urgent medical treatment.
safety_note_zh: 請保持儀式環境潔淨，並讓靈性工作配合實際照護。切勿以召喚取代緊急醫療。

name: Valefor
appearance_en: Appears as a lion with the head of a donkey
appearance_zh: 呈現獅身驢首之形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Valefor, aligned with theft and temptation.
invocation_en: I call upon VALEFOR, noble Duke of the West, commander of 10 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in theft, temptation, and binding.
invocation_zh: 我召喚瓦勒福爾，西方尊貴的公爵，統領10個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予盜取、誘惑、束縛之助。
safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.
safety_note_zh: 請加強靈性防護、保持供品潔淨，並正式完成閉儀。不要讓任何通往幽界的通道無人看守。

name: Amon
appearance_en: Appears as a wolf with a serpent tail breathing fire, then as a raven-headed man
appearance_zh: 先為吐火的狼身蛇尾，後化為烏鴉頭的人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Amon, aligned with reconciliation and love.
invocation_en: I call upon AMON, noble Marquis of the East, commander of 40 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in reconciliation, love, and prophecy.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿蒙，東方尊貴的侯爵，統領40個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予和解、愛情、預言之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Barbatos
appearance_en: Appears as a horned hunter or archer accompanied by spirits of the forest
appearance_zh: 化作長角獵人或弓手，身旁伴隨林野之靈
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Barbatos, aligned with animals and treasure.
invocation_en: I call upon BARBATOS, noble Duke of the East, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in animals, treasure, and reconciliation.
invocation_zh: 我召喚巴巴托斯，東方尊貴的公爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予動物、寶藏、和解之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Paimon
appearance_en: Appears crowned and riding a dromedary, preceded by loud musical spirits
appearance_zh: 戴王冠騎單峰駱駝而來，前方有喧響樂隊般的靈體開道
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Paimon, aligned with learning and wisdom.
invocation_en: I call upon PAIMON, noble King of the West, commander of 200 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in learning, wisdom, and binding.
invocation_zh: 我召喚派蒙，西方尊貴的王，統領200個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予學識、智慧、束縛之助。
safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.
safety_note_zh: 請加強靈性防護、保持供品潔淨，並正式完成閉儀。不要讓任何通往幽界的通道無人看守。

name: Buer
appearance_en: Appears in the form of a centaur-like archer
appearance_zh: 以半人馬弓手般的形象出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Buer, aligned with healing and wisdom.
invocation_en: I call upon BUER, noble President of the South, commander of 50 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in healing, wisdom, and familiars.
invocation_zh: 我召喚布耶爾，南方尊貴的總裁，統領50個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予療癒、智慧、使魔之助。
safety_note_en: Use clean ritual conditions and pair all spiritual work with practical care. Never substitute invocation for urgent medical treatment.
safety_note_zh: 請保持儀式環境潔淨，並讓靈性工作配合實際照護。切勿以召喚取代緊急醫療。

name: Gusion
appearance_en: Appears as a noble spirit in human likeness
appearance_zh: 以高貴靈體的人形顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Gusion, aligned with divination and reconciliation.
invocation_en: I call upon GUSION, noble Duke of the East, commander of 40 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, reconciliation, and honor.
invocation_zh: 我召喚古辛，東方尊貴的公爵，統領40個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、和解、榮耀之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Sitri
appearance_en: Appears first as a leopard with griffin wings, then as a beautiful human
appearance_zh: 先呈豹身鷹翼之形，後化為俊美人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Sitri, aligned with love and passion.
invocation_en: I call upon SITRI, noble Prince of the West, commander of 60 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in love, passion, and secrets.
invocation_zh: 我召喚西特里，西方尊貴的王子，統領60個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、激情、秘密之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Beleth
appearance_en: Appears as a terrible king on a pale horse with trumpets sounding before him
appearance_zh: 作為騎蒼白戰馬的可怖君王現身，前有號角齊鳴
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Beleth, aligned with love and authority.
invocation_en: I call upon BELETH, noble King of the East, commander of 85 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in love, authority, and honor.
invocation_zh: 我召喚貝列斯，東方尊貴的王，統領85個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、權威、榮耀之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Leraje
appearance_en: Appears as a handsome archer dressed in green
appearance_zh: 以身穿綠衣的俊美弓箭手形象出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Leraje, aligned with war and wounds.
invocation_en: I call upon LERAJE, noble Marquis of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in war, wounds, and archery.
invocation_zh: 我召喚勒拉耶，南方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予戰爭、傷口、箭術之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Eligos
powers_en: Wins favor with lords and knights
powers_zh: 贏得領主與騎士的青睞
appearance_en: Appears as a handsome knight carrying a lance, banner, and serpent
appearance_zh: 顯現為手持長槍、旗幟與蛇的俊美騎士
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Eligos, aligned with war and secrets.
invocation_en: I call upon ELIGOS, noble Duke of the East, commander of 60 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in war, secrets, and honor.
invocation_zh: 我召喚艾利戈斯，東方尊貴的公爵，統領60個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予戰爭、秘密、榮耀之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Zepar
appearance_en: Appears as a soldier clothed in red armor
appearance_zh: 以身披紅甲的士兵形象顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Zepar, aligned with love and passion.
invocation_en: I call upon ZEPAR, noble Duke of the South, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in love, passion, and desire.
invocation_zh: 我召喚澤帕爾，南方尊貴的公爵，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、激情、欲望之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Botis
appearance_en: Appears first as a viper, then as a horned man with a sword
appearance_zh: 先現毒蛇之形，後化為持劍有角的人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Botis, aligned with divination and reconciliation.
invocation_en: I call upon BOTIS, noble Count/President of the South, commander of 60 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, reconciliation, and truth.
invocation_zh: 我召喚波提斯，南方尊貴的伯爵/總裁，統領60個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、和解、真理之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Bathin
appearance_en: Appears as a strong man with a serpent tail riding a pale horse
appearance_zh: 顯現為騎蒼白馬、長有蛇尾的健壯男子
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Bathin, aligned with herbs and stones.
invocation_en: I call upon BATHIN, noble Duke of the West, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in herbs, stones, and travel.
invocation_zh: 我召喚巴丁，西方尊貴的公爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予藥草、礦石、旅行之助。
safety_note_en: Work with firm containment and a precise intention. Avoid dangerous weather, open water, or unfocused travel magic during the rite.
safety_note_zh: 作業時要有穩固結界與明確意圖。儀式期間避免危險天候、開放水域或目標不明的旅行魔法。

name: Sallos
powers_en: Causes love between men and women
appearance_en: Appears as a gallant soldier riding a crocodile and wearing a ducal crown
appearance_zh: 化為騎鱷魚且佩戴公爵冠冕的瀟灑士兵
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Sallos, aligned with love and peace.
invocation_en: I call upon SALLOS, noble Duke of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in love, peace, and friendship.
invocation_zh: 我召喚薩洛斯，南方尊貴的公爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、和平、友誼之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Purson
appearance_en: Appears as a lion-faced man riding a bear and bearing a viper, with trumpets before him
appearance_zh: 現為獅面人騎熊持毒蛇，前方有號角開路
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Purson, aligned with divination and treasure.
invocation_en: I call upon PURSON, noble King of the North, commander of 22 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, treasure, and transformation.
invocation_zh: 我召喚普爾松，北方尊貴的王，統領22個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、寶藏、變形之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Marax
appearance_en: Appears as a great bull with a human face
appearance_zh: 呈現為人面巨牛
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Marax, aligned with astronomy and herbs.
invocation_en: I call upon MARAX, noble Count/President of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in astronomy, herbs, and familiars.
invocation_zh: 我召喚馬拉克斯，南方尊貴的伯爵/總裁，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予天文、藥草、使魔之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Ipos
appearance_en: Appears as an angelic figure with a lion head, goose feet, and a hare tail
appearance_zh: 形如獅首、鵝足、兔尾的天使形體
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Ipos, aligned with divination and boldness.
invocation_en: I call upon IPOS, noble Count/Prince of the West, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, boldness, and cunning.
invocation_zh: 我召喚伊波斯，西方尊貴的伯爵/王子，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、勇氣、機智之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Aim
powers_zh: 給出真實而智慧的回答
appearance_en: Appears as a handsome man with three heads riding a viper and carrying a firebrand
appearance_zh: 以三頭俊美男子騎毒蛇、手持火炬之形出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Aim, aligned with destruction and wisdom.
invocation_en: I call upon AIM, noble Duke of the South, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in destruction, wisdom, and truth.
invocation_zh: 我召喚艾姆，南方尊貴的公爵，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予毀滅、智慧、真理之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Naberius
appearance_en: Appears as a black crane or raven speaking with a rough voice
appearance_zh: 以黑鶴或烏鴉之形出現，聲音粗啞
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Naberius, aligned with learning and dignity.
invocation_en: I call upon NABERIUS, noble Marquis of the West, commander of 19 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in learning, dignity, and rhetoric.
invocation_zh: 我召喚納貝流士，西方尊貴的侯爵，統領19個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予學識、尊位、修辭之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Glasya-Labolas
appearance_en: Appears as a winged dog
appearance_zh: 以長翼之犬的形態出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Glasya-Labolas, aligned with learning and war.
invocation_en: I call upon GLASYA-LABOLAS, noble Count/President of the East, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in learning, war, and invisibility.
invocation_zh: 我召喚格拉夏-拉波拉斯，東方尊貴的伯爵/總裁，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予學識、戰爭、隱形之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Buné
appearance_en: Appears as a three-headed dragon with the heads of a dog, griffin, and man
appearance_zh: 顯現為三頭龍，分別具犬首、鷹獅首與人首
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Buné, aligned with necromancy and ghosts.
invocation_en: I call upon BUNÉ, noble Duke of the West, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in necromancy, ghosts, and treasure.
invocation_zh: 我召喚布涅，西方尊貴的公爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予死靈術、幽靈、寶藏之助。
safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.
safety_note_zh: 請加強靈性防護、保持供品潔淨，並正式完成閉儀。不要讓任何通往幽界的通道無人看守。

name: Ronové
appearance_en: Appears in a monstrous but commanding form
appearance_zh: 以怪異卻威嚴的形態現身
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Ronové, aligned with languages and servants.
invocation_en: I call upon RONOVÉ, noble Marquis/Count of the East, commander of 19 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in languages, servants, and honor.
invocation_zh: 我召喚羅諾維，東方尊貴的侯爵/伯爵，統領19個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予語言、僕役、榮耀之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Berith
appearance_en: Appears as a soldier in red riding a red horse and wearing a golden crown
appearance_zh: 現為身穿紅衣、騎紅馬並戴金冠的戰士
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Berith, aligned with divination and metals.
invocation_en: I call upon BERITH, noble Duke of the East, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, metals, and honor.
invocation_zh: 我召喚貝里斯，東方尊貴的公爵，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、金屬、榮耀之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Astaroth
appearance_en: Appears as a foul angel riding an infernal dragon and holding a viper
appearance_zh: 以騎地獄巨龍、手持毒蛇的墮落天使形象出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Astaroth, aligned with secrets and learning.
invocation_en: I call upon ASTAROTH, noble Duke of the West, commander of 40 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in secrets, learning, and wisdom.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿斯塔羅斯，西方尊貴的公爵，統領40個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予秘密、學識、智慧之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Forneus
powers_zh: 促成愛情並使敵人和解
appearance_en: Appears as a great sea monster
appearance_zh: 以巨大的海中怪獸之形顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Forneus, aligned with rhetoric and languages.
invocation_en: I call upon FORNEUS, noble Marquis of the West, commander of 29 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in rhetoric, languages, and love.
invocation_zh: 我召喚福爾紐斯，西方尊貴的侯爵，統領29個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予修辭、語言、愛情之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Foras
appearance_en: Appears as a strong human figure
appearance_zh: 以強壯的人形出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Foras, aligned with herbs and stones.
invocation_en: I call upon FORAS, noble President of the West, commander of 29 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in herbs, stones, and invisibility.
invocation_zh: 我召喚佛拉斯，西方尊貴的總裁，統領29個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予藥草、礦石、隱形之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Asmodeus
appearance_en: Appears with three heads, serpent tail, goose feet, and rides a dragon breathing fire
appearance_zh: 三頭、蛇尾、鵝足，騎乘吐火巨龍而來
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Asmodeus, aligned with numbers and astronomy.
invocation_en: I call upon ASMODEUS, noble King of the East, commander of 72 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in numbers, astronomy, and crafts.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿斯莫德，東方尊貴的王，統領72個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予算術、天文、工藝之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Gaap
appearance_en: Appears in human form as a learned southern prince
appearance_zh: 以博學的南方王子人形顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Gaap, aligned with divination and love.
invocation_en: I call upon GAAP, noble Prince/President of the South, commander of 66 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, love, and hate.
invocation_zh: 我召喚加普，南方尊貴的王子/總裁，統領66個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、愛情、憎恨之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Furfur
appearance_en: Appears as a hart or deer with a fiery tail, and as an angel when constrained
appearance_zh: 通常如火尾牡鹿顯現，受制後可化為天使形體
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Furfur, aligned with love and weather.
invocation_en: I call upon FURFUR, noble Count of the East, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in love, weather, and secrets.
invocation_zh: 我召喚富爾富爾，東方尊貴的伯爵，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、風暴、秘密之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Marchosias
appearance_en: Appears as a wolf with griffin wings and a serpent tail, breathing fire, then as a man
appearance_zh: 先為吐火的狼身鷹翼蛇尾，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Marchosias, aligned with war and truth.
invocation_en: I call upon MARCHOSIAS, noble Marquis of the West, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in war, truth, and boldness.
invocation_zh: 我召喚馬可西亞斯，西方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予戰爭、真理、勇氣之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Stolas
appearance_en: Appears as a crowned raven or owl before assuming human form
appearance_zh: 先以戴冠烏鴉或貓頭鷹現身，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Stolas, aligned with astronomy and herbs.

invocation_zh: 我召喚斯托拉斯，南方尊貴的王子，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予天文、藥草、礦石之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Phenex

appearance_zh: 如鳳凰般歌唱，聲音似孩童；受請求後可化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Phenex, aligned with poetry and learning.
invocation_en: I call upon PHENEX, noble Marquis of the West, commander of 20 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in poetry, learning, and wisdom.
invocation_zh: 我召喚菲尼克斯，西方尊貴的侯爵，統領20個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予詩歌、學識、智慧之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Halphas

appearance_zh: 形如鸛鳥，聲音粗啞
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Halphas, aligned with fortress and war.

invocation_zh: 我召喚哈爾法斯，北方尊貴的伯爵，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予堡壘、戰爭之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.

appearance_zh: 先以巨鴉之形出現，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Malphas, aligned with houses and fortress.

safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Räum
appearance_en: Appears as a crow and then takes human shape
appearance_zh: 先呈烏鴉之形，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Räum, aligned with theft and destruction.
invocation_en: I call upon RÄUM, noble Count of the East, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in theft, destruction, and prophecy.
invocation_zh: 我召喚勞姆，東方尊貴的伯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予盜取、毀滅、預言之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Focalor
appearance_en: Appears as a man with griffin wings
appearance_zh: 以長有鷹獅翅膀的人形現身
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Focalor, aligned with water and weather.

name: Vepar

appearance_zh: 以美人魚之形顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Vepar, aligned with water and travel.

safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.

name: Sabnock
powers_en: Causes worms to breed in sores
appearance_en: Appears as an armed soldier with a lion head riding a pale horse
appearance_zh: 以獅首武裝士兵騎蒼白戰馬之姿出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Sabnock, aligned with fortress and wounds.
invocation_en: I call upon SABNOCK, noble Marquis of the South, commander of 50 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in fortress, wounds, and war.
invocation_zh: 我召喚薩布諾克，南方尊貴的侯爵，統領50個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予堡壘、傷口、戰爭之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.

name: Shax
powers_en: Takes away sight, hearing, and understanding
powers_zh: 奪走視覺、聽覺與理解力
appearance_en: Appears as a stork-like bird speaking with a hoarse voice
appearance_zh: 形如鸛鳥，並以沙啞聲音說話
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Shax, aligned with theft and senses.

invocation_zh: 我召喚沙克斯，東方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予盜取、感官、秘密之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.

name: Viné

name: Bifrons

safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.

name: Uvall

appearance_zh: 先以單峰駱駝之形出現，後化為說埃及語的人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Uvall, aligned with love and prophecy.

invocation_zh: 我召喚烏瓦爾，東方尊貴的公爵，統領37個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、預言、友誼之助。

name: Haagenti

sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Haagenti, aligned with metals and transformation.

name: Crocell

appearance_en: Appears as an angelic spirit
appearance_zh: 以天使般的靈體現身
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Crocell, aligned with geometry and learning.

safety_note_en: Work with firm containment and a precise intention. Avoid dangerous weather, open water, or unfocused travel magic during the rite.
safety_note_zh: 作業時要有穩固結界與明確意圖。儀式期間避免危險天候、開放水域或目標不明的旅行魔法。

appearance_zh: 三頭、蛇尾、火眼，騎乘巨熊而來

name: Alloces
appearance_en: Appears as a soldier with a lion face, red complexion, and burning eyes riding a great horse
appearance_zh: 以獅面紅膚、雙眼燃燒的騎兵形象出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Alloces, aligned with astronomy and learning.
invocation_en: I call upon ALLOCES, noble Duke of the East, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in astronomy, learning, and war.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿洛凱斯，東方尊貴的公爵，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予天文、學識、戰爭之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Camio
powers_en: Understands the speech of birds and beasts
appearance_en: Appears first as a thrush and then as a man carrying a sharp sword
appearance_zh: 先如畫眉鳥般顯現，後化為持利劍的人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Camio, aligned with animals and truth.
invocation_en: I call upon CAMIO, noble President of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in animals, truth, and divination.
invocation_zh: 我召喚卡米歐，南方尊貴的總裁，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予動物、真理、占卜之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Murmur
powers_en: Constrains the souls of the dead
appearance_en: Appears as a warrior riding a griffin, with ministers sounding trumpets before him
appearance_zh: 以騎鷹獅的戰士之姿出現，前有號角侍從開道
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Murmur, aligned with wisdom and necromancy.
invocation_en: I call upon MURMUR, noble Duke/Count of the East, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in wisdom, necromancy, and binding.
invocation_zh: 我召喚穆爾穆爾，東方尊貴的公爵/伯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予智慧、死靈術、束縛之助。
safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.
safety_note_zh: 請加強靈性防護、保持供品潔淨，並正式完成閉儀。不要讓任何通往幽界的通道無人看守。

name: Orobas
appearance_en: Appears first as a horse and then as a man
appearance_zh: 先以馬形出現，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Orobas, aligned with divination and virtue.
invocation_en: I call upon OROBAS, noble Prince of the East, commander of 20 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, virtue, and honor.
invocation_zh: 我召喚歐羅巴斯，東方尊貴的王子，統領20個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、德性、榮耀之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Gremory
appearance_en: Appears as a beautiful duchess wearing a crown and riding a camel
appearance_zh: 以戴冠冕、騎駱駝的美麗女公爵形象顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Gremory, aligned with divination and love.
invocation_en: I call upon GREMORY, noble Duke of the West, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, love, and treasure.
invocation_zh: 我召喚格莫里，西方尊貴的公爵，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、愛情、寶藏之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Ose
appearance_en: Appears as a leopard and then as a man
appearance_zh: 先為豹形，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Ose, aligned with learning and transformation.
invocation_en: I call upon OSE, noble President of the South, commander of 3 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in learning, transformation, and secrets.
invocation_zh: 我召喚奧賽，南方尊貴的總裁，統領3個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予學識、變形、秘密之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Amy
appearance_en: Appears first as a flame of fire and then as a man
appearance_zh: 先如一團火焰顯現，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Amy, aligned with astronomy and learning.
invocation_en: I call upon AMY, noble President of the South, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in astronomy, learning, and familiars.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿米，南方尊貴的總裁，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予天文、學識、使魔之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Oriax
powers_en: Teaches the virtues of planets and the zodiac
powers_zh: 教授行星與黃道之德性
appearance_en: Appears as a lion with a serpent tail riding a horse and bearing two great serpents
appearance_zh: 現為騎馬的獅子，拖著蛇尾，並手持兩條巨蛇
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Oriax, aligned with astronomy and virtue.
invocation_en: I call upon ORIAX, noble Marquis of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in astronomy, virtue, and transformation.
invocation_zh: 我召喚奧里亞克斯，南方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予天文、德性、變形之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Vapula
appearance_en: Appears as a lion with griffin wings
appearance_zh: 以獅身鷹翼之形出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Vapula, aligned with wisdom and mechanics.
invocation_en: I call upon VAPULA, noble Duke of the East, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in wisdom, mechanics, and learning.
invocation_zh: 我召喚瓦普拉，東方尊貴的公爵，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予智慧、機械、學識之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Zagan
powers_en: Turns wine into blood or water
appearance_en: Appears first as a bull with griffin wings and then as a man
appearance_zh: 先為鷹獅翼公牛，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Zagan, aligned with cunning and transformation.
invocation_en: I call upon ZAGAN, noble King/President of the South, commander of 33 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in cunning, transformation, and metals.
invocation_zh: 我召喚扎甘，南方尊貴的王/總裁，統領33個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予機智、變形、金屬之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Valac
appearance_en: Appears as a child with angel wings riding a two-headed dragon
appearance_zh: 以長有天使翅膀的孩童騎雙頭龍之形出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Valac, aligned with serpents and treasure.
invocation_en: I call upon VALAC, noble President of the South, commander of 38 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in serpents, treasure, and secrets.
invocation_zh: 我召喚瓦拉克，南方尊貴的總裁，統領38個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予蛇類、寶藏、秘密之助。
safety_note_en: Strengthen spiritual protections, keep offerings clean, and formally close the rite. Do not leave any channel to the unseen unattended.
safety_note_zh: 請加強靈性防護、保持供品潔淨，並正式完成閉儀。不要讓任何通往幽界的通道無人看守。

name: Andras
powers_en: Kills the careless operator and servants
powers_zh: 殺害粗心的施術者與僕從
appearance_en: Appears as an angel with a raven head riding a black wolf and bearing a sharp sword
appearance_zh: 顯現為烏鴉頭天使騎黑狼、手持利劍
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Andras, aligned with discord and war.
invocation_en: I call upon ANDRAS, noble Marquis of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in discord, war, and destruction.
invocation_zh: 我召喚安德拉斯，南方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予不和、戰爭、毀滅之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Haures
appearance_en: Appears as a leopard at first, then as a man with fiery eyes
appearance_zh: 先以豹形出現，後化為雙目如火的人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Haures, aligned with divination and destruction.
invocation_en: I call upon HAURES, noble Duke of the West, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in divination, destruction, and resistance.
invocation_zh: 我召喚豪雷斯，西方尊貴的公爵，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予占卜、毀滅、抵禦之助。
safety_note_en: Keep a strict protective circle and a clearly limited charge. Do not approach this spirit in anger or with reckless harmful intent.
safety_note_zh: 務必維持嚴密的保護圓與明確限制的請求。切勿在憤怒或魯莽傷害的意圖下接近此靈。

name: Andrealphus
appearance_en: Appears as a noisy peacock and later as a human
appearance_zh: 先以吵鬧孔雀之形出現，後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Andrealphus, aligned with geometry and transformation.
invocation_en: I call upon ANDREALPHUS, noble Marquis of the East, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in geometry, transformation, and astronomy.
invocation_zh: 我召喚安德烈亞爾弗斯，東方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予幾何、變形、天文之助。
safety_note_en: Maintain clear self-identification and grounding throughout the operation. Banish thoroughly after any work involving glamour, thought, or altered form.
safety_note_zh: 在整個操作中保持清晰自我認知與接地。凡涉及魅惑、心念或變形之作業，事後務必徹底驅散。

name: Cimeies
appearance_en: Appears as a black horse or as a man riding a black horse
appearance_zh: 以黑馬，或騎黑馬的人形出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Cimeies, aligned with grammar and logic.
invocation_en: I call upon CIMEIES, noble Marquis of the East, commander of 20 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in grammar, logic, and treasure.
invocation_zh: 我召喚奇米埃斯，東方尊貴的侯爵，統領20個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予文法、邏輯、寶藏之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。

name: Amdusias
appearance_en: Appears as a unicorn and later takes human form amid the sound of trumpets and cymbals
appearance_zh: 先以獨角獸之形現身，後伴隨號角與鈸聲化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Amdusias, aligned with music and animals.
invocation_en: I call upon AMDUSIAS, noble Duke of the East, commander of 29 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in music, animals, and familiars.
invocation_zh: 我召喚阿姆杜西亞斯，東方尊貴的公爵，統領29個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予音樂、動物、使魔之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Belial
appearance_en: Appears as a beautiful angel in a chariot of fire
appearance_zh: 以坐在火焰戰車中的美麗天使形象出現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Belial, aligned with love and honor.
invocation_en: I call upon BELIAL, noble King of the North, commander of 80 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in love, honor, and authority.
invocation_zh: 我召喚貝利亞爾，北方尊貴的王，統領80個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予愛情、榮耀、權威之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Decarabia
powers_en: Knows the virtues of herbs and stones
appearance_en: Appears first as a pentagram-shaped star and then as a man when commanded
appearance_zh: 先以五芒星之形顯現，受命後化為人形
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Decarabia, aligned with herbs and stones.
invocation_en: I call upon DECARABIA, noble Marquis of the South, commander of 30 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in herbs, stones, and animals.
invocation_zh: 我召喚德卡拉比亞，南方尊貴的侯爵，統領30個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予藥草、礦石、動物之助。
safety_note_en: Record all responses carefully, maintain respectful authority, and test revelations before acting upon them.
safety_note_zh: 請仔細記錄一切回應，保持尊重而有權威的態度，並在採取行動前驗證所得啟示。

name: Seere
appearance_en: Appears as a beautiful man riding a winged horse
appearance_zh: 以騎有翼駿馬的俊美男子形象顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Seere, aligned with travel and secrets.
invocation_en: I call upon SEERE, noble Prince of the East, commander of 26 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in travel, secrets, and abundance.
invocation_zh: 我召喚賽爾，東方尊貴的王子，統領26個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予旅行、秘密、豐盛之助。
safety_note_en: Work with firm containment and a precise intention. Avoid dangerous weather, open water, or unfocused travel magic during the rite.
safety_note_zh: 作業時要有穩固結界與明確意圖。儀式期間避免危險天候、開放水域或目標不明的旅行魔法。

name: Dantalion
appearance_en: Appears as a man with many faces holding a book
appearance_zh: 以手持書卷、擁有眾多面孔的人形顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Dantalion, aligned with thoughts and transformation.
invocation_en: I call upon DANTALION, noble Duke of the North, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in thoughts, transformation, and love.
invocation_zh: 我召喚但他林，北方尊貴的公爵，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予思想、變形、愛情之助。
safety_note_en: State ethical boundaries clearly and avoid coercive requests in matters of affection. Ground emotions carefully before dismissal.
safety_note_zh: 務必清楚聲明倫理界線，避免在情感議題上提出強制性請求。送離前要仔細穩定情緒。

name: Andromalius
appearance_en: Appears as a man holding a serpent
appearance_zh: 以手持蛇的人形顯現
sigil_description: An angular seal of intersecting strokes, loops, and descending hooks traditionally attributed to Andromalius, aligned with theft and secrets.
invocation_en: I call upon ANDROMALIUS, noble Count of the North, commander of 36 legions. Come in peace and lend your aid in theft, secrets, and treasure.
invocation_zh: 我召喚安德羅瑪流士，北方尊貴的伯爵，統領36個軍團。請和平降臨，賜予盜取、秘密、寶藏之助。
safety_note_en: Guard against greed and pride. Verify all promised gains carefully and keep your petition proportionate and lawful.
safety_note_zh: 提防貪念與傲慢。對任何應許的利益都要仔細驗證，並使請求保持節制且合乎正道。
